roa.docketEntryComment: ADA ADD TO CALENDAR FOR CHANGE OF PLEA FILED
DA'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT FILED

/CAL  SENTENCING/TWS/CH3 ISS PROB PROB 1 Y PJ 1 D/CTS  1/IND/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CCU/CTORD: 16 HOURS OF ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES//WEAP/WS/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/SA1: ISIDRO GRANDE TORRES/SAORD3/SAORD//SATERM/VD: 05-13-21/

/CAL  ADA ADD TO CALENDAR FOR CHANGE OF PLEA/INTC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, 236PC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE FOR CONTINUANCE/X:NO OPPOSITION BY DEFENSE/MO GRTD/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:ARRAIGNMENT AS TO AMENDED COMPLAINT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THERIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/X:COUNSEL STIPULATE AS TO MEDICAL RECORDSSUBPOENAED  BY THE PEOPLE THAT IF THEY HAVE BEEN RECEIVED BY THE CLERK'S OFFICE THE RECORDS MAY BE RELEASEDTO THE PEOPLE,/CONT/DOP/X:NOT REPORTED - SUBPOENAED RECORDS, ENVELOPE #1, RECEIVED BY THE CLERK'S OFFICE AND RELEASEDTO THE PEOPLE,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/SAORD/SA1: ISIDRO G,/SA2: 2090 MISSION ST APT 6/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & ARRAIGN ON AMENDEDCOMPLAINT/TE:90 MINS/DOP/
